ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: $User.ProfileId != "00eb0000000dZws" && $User.ProfileId != "00eb0000000oBvc" && $Profile.Name != 'SW SalesOps Extended' && $Profile.Name != 'SW Wolves' && $Profile.Name != 'BI Dev' && Probability >= 0.6 && ISBLANK(How_do_we_solve_it__c) && ISBLANK( Account.How_do_we_solve_it__c ) &&NOT(ISCHANGED(SYS_CloseFlow__c))&& NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,'Feature Update')) && RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Wolves'
ValidationRule.errorMessage: How we solve customer's pain is blank in the account please update it either on the Opportunity or the Account level.
